meta.name: claude-code-oauth-capture
meta.description: Example profile — not for production use without review. Extends claude-code with OAuth /login capture: the proxy intercepts the token endpoint response and swaps real access/refresh tokens for nono_<hex> broker nonces before they reach the agent. The agent and its keychain entry only ever hold nonces; the real tokens live in a nono-only keychain entry the agent cannot read.
